text: This blossom of the clan fell from our family tree, meeting her death with the same grace she showed in life.
Our missionary failed to spread dissent amongst the ranks of the enemy.
Our monk failed to spread discontent amongst the enemy.
Our daimyo chose a wife from the family of one of his trusted retainers. Their union will cement the bonds of loyalty within the clan.
Tensions in this province are reaching dangerous levels. There will be insurrection if the people's anger is not appeased.
An honourable death; no warrior can ask for more. The clan will mourn the loss of this great man.
All eyes are upon us! Our achievement truly is the stuff of legend!
A building was sabotaged by an enemy shinobi. The culprit escaped undetected.
Some men's hearts are weak. An enemy monomi successfully sabotaged our army.
An enemy ninja was detected whilst attempting to assassinate a member of the clan!
Construction of the following building is complete:
It seems that even the most virtuous have their price! Our agent used his silver tongue to charm the enemy and bring them around to our way of thinking.
An enemy agent was apprehended by our metsuke. Whilst insufficient evidence was found to incriminate them, they were, nonetheless, temporarily imprisoned.
All Japan looks in awe at the legendary building our rivals have completed.
An enemy monomi was apprehended and executed following an assassination attempt.
This noble warrior died whilst serving aboard one of our ships.
Dishonour! This character has gone over to the enemy.
Our successes have been many. Our worth and potential are now recognised by the people.
In return for service to the Shogunate, you have been granted the rank of governor within the Bakufu.\\n\\nYou may now appoint a general to the office of inspector general.
Our continued support of the Shogun pleases the Bakufu greatly; for your efforts, you have been promoted to young elder!\\n\\nYou may now appoint a general to the office of comptroller.
Our clan grows strong, ever loyal to the Shogun's cause. In recognition of your service, he has made you an elder.\\n\\nYou may now appoint a general to the office of chief of staff.

The civil war rages on, and our achievements in the Shogun's name have been without equal. In honour of your loyalty and dilligence, he has named you great elder!\\n\\nYou may now appoint a general to the office of commander-in-chief.
All hope is lost! The clan is no more; our warriors feed the earth!
This is an auspicious day! Our foreign veteran fought with honour and killed his enemy in single combat.
This geisha is ready to develop her skills, having refined her aptitude for assassination.
This ungrateful populace have taken up arms against their rightful masters!
Enraged at the loss of traditional values, samurai in this province have risen up in revolt!
Some are too closed-minded to aspire to enlightenment. We failed to indoctrinate this enemy agent.
Continued trade between our clan and this valued ally is no longer possible.
Inconceivable! One of our subjects fell in single combat against a foreign veteran!

Japan stands in awe of our might! Rumours abound that the Shogun is rallying support in a bid to crush our clan out of existence. Our enemies and those loyal to the Shogun will surely fall in league with him - we cannot rely upon even our oldest allies for aid. There is little time; we must do everything in our power to prepare for the coming storm.
An assassination attempt has been made against us! The perpetrator is still at large but must be dealt with.
Our monomi failed to sabotage his target. He was captured and summarily executed.
The enemy attempted to assassinate a member of our clan! Having succeeded only in wounding them, the assassin has now escaped.
An enemy ninja was detected attempting to sabotage our building.
An enemy ninja was captured and executed whilst trying to sabotage one of our buildings.
A woman's wiles cannot sway loyalty to one's lord. This enemy geisha was executed for attempting to enchant one of our subjects.
Our shinobi failed to sabotage the enemy army and was detected, barely managing to escape with his life.
Following discourse with our missionary, an enemy agent saw sense and renounced his old ways.
A man uncertain of his beliefs is easy to lead astray. Our monk successfully convinced an enemy agent to abandon his cause.
Our shirabyoshi successfully seduced an enemy. He has abandoned his former master and sworn fealty to our lord.
Our kin has been put to the sword by his captors following a premature break in the diplomatic agreement between our clans.
The loss of our incense resource will affect our ability to carry out our religious rites.
When words fail the only option is war. These two clans cannot reconcile their differences until blood has been spilled in their names.
An enemy shinobi was captured and executed whilst trying to sabotage our army.
A shinsengumi was caught attempting to coerce our troops to join him. He will bother us no longer.
Our foreign veteran used skill and cunning to sabotage his target building.
Our diplomatic agreement with another clan was broken prematurely. The life of their kin, held hostage by us as part of that agreement, is now forfeit.
A new daughter is born to the clan. May she bring peace and serenity to the clan.
An enemy shinobi was detected whilst attempting the assassination of a man loyal to our clan.
An assassination attempt has been made against us! The perpetrator is still at large and must be dealt with.
Chaos reigns! Our ishin shishi successfully incited revolt in this settlement.
A rival geisha was captured and executed whilst attempting to distract our troops.
From the ashes of war, a new clan rises to ride into history!
Deception! An army was discovered lying in ambush for an unsuspecting enemy force.
Our shinsengumi failed to eliminate his target, but managed to evade capture and death.
We have lost an important resource to the enemy, barring access to certain buildings and units. Recapture should be a priority.
Our shinobi failed to eliminate his target and was detected, managing to escape the clutches of the enemy and a certain death.
This junsatsushi is ready to develop his skills, having honed his abilities through his service to the family.
We will not suffer others to meter out false justice in our lands. An enemy metsuke was apprehended and killed.
Our shinsengumi was executed in the course of his duty, having failed to incite rebellion amongst the people.
A foreign veteran challenged one of our own to single combat. His skills were no match; he died with honour.
A foreign veteran has bested one of our subjects in single combat, both wounding and dishonouring him.
Tragedy! Our noble lord was struck down by the enemy in the heat of battle! His loss will be mourned greatly.
After lengthy consideration we have chosen to abandon both the Emperor and the Shogunate, establishing an independent republic with which to forge our own destiny.
An enemy's dishonour is indeed cause for celebration. Our junsatsushi successfully paid a rival agent to abandon their lord, thereby weakening our enemy.
An enemy sou attempted to seed dissention amongst our people, but their loyalty never faltered.
An enemy force is blocking a railway which our forces would otherwise be able to use for transport; they will need to be defeated or chased away before transit may resume.
Devotion to one's calling leads to greatness. This sensei's achievements will prove beneficial to the whole clan.
No amount of persuasion could convince the people of this province to rebel against their masters.
Although unable to kill his target, our monomi wounded his adversary, putting him out of action for a while.
Shameful! Having been paid-off by an enemy junsatsushi, one of our agents abandoned his lord.
To the victor, the spoils. We looted this province according to the rights of conquest, gaining our clan vital funds. Alas, this action has placed our daimyo's honour in doubt.
Our geisha failed to complete her task and was detected by the enemy. It will not end well for her.
Some men's hearts are weak. A rival geisha successfully distracted our troops.
Tragedy! Our geisha was murdered for attempting to enchant an enemy subject.
In these tumultuous times opinions are as changing as the wind. This clan reverted to Buddhism, forsaking their Christian beliefs.
A murderous geisha was detected. She was unable to complete her bloody task.
Our geisha successfully distracted the rival army.
The enemy sent a shinsengumi to foster dissent in our province. With failure his life is forfeit.
Our shinobi successfully sabotaged his target, using all the subversive skills available to him.
This impressive new ship will help us tame the seas to our will.
The people, joined by monks, have risen up in revolt against us.
This general's wounds were not enough to dispatch him. He has retired to convalesce, but will return to his duty when recovered.
A rival geisha has been seen in one of our towns, attempting to distract the local garrison. Unswayed by her performance, they have remained steadfast.
An enemy junsatsushi attempted to secure the allegiance of our subjects. None have been tempted, but the enemy remains at large.
Our cotton resource was lost, depriving the people of its benefits.
Our monomi failed to eliminate his target. He was caught and executed whilst trying to escape.
Our junsatushi failed to secure the allegiance of this province and its people.
Our geisha failed to distract an enemy garrison.
Although our friendship is not lightly cast aside, the alliance between us is over.
Our monomi succeeded in sabotaging the enemy army and escaped undetected.
A tragic day, for with our daimyo's death the succession is uncertain. A regent was appointed to rule until his son is released from captivity.
We have secured a source of copper, enabling the production of strong ships.
This man failed us. Caught attempting to coerce enemy forces to join us, he was summarily put to death.
Our men detected the presence of a rival ninja. We must be cautious.
A travesty of justice effected by the enemy led to the imprisonment of one of our agents. As the sentence is short they will return to service soon.
We have secured a source of coal. We can develop a railway network, technology permitting.
This general is ready to develop his skills, having honed his ability to command through fighting the clan’s enemies.
This province was lost to the enemy. The resources and income it provided are no longer available to us.
Our shinobi failed to sabotage his target army. He was caught and executed out-of-hand.
An enemy monomi was captured and executed whilst trying to sabotage one of our buildings.
Our ninja successfully sabotaged his target, using all the dishonourable skills available to him.
An enemy shinobi was spotted moving amongst the men! Early detection prevented any misfortune from befalling the army.
PLACEHOLDER!
Deplorable! One of our subjects was seduced by an enemy shirabyoshi. Now he serves her lord.
Our foreign veteran managed to wound his enemy in single combat, thereby forcing him to flee in shame and fear.
This hostage has been released and returned to us by the following clan:
Our agent was successfully tempted to renounce his beliefs by an enemy missionary.
One of our agents turned his back on the clan, accepting the lies of the enemy as truth.
We have secured a source of silk, allowing our textiles industry and buddhist sites to develop.
All Japan bows before us! The daimyo has become Shogun, his authority unchallenged!
Following an assassination attempt we captured and executed an enemy ninja.
Radical Imperialists in this province have risen up in revolt against us!
Our ishin shishi failed to eliminate his target, but evaded capture and death.
A building was sabotaged by an enemy foreign veteran. He has managed to evade capture.
Deprived of their upkeep by our clan's bankruptcy, this unit has deserted.
Despite the best efforts of the enemy, our agent stuck to their convictions.
Our metsuke apprehended an enemy agent. They were successfully charged with heinous misdeeds and put to death.
No longer of use to us, this hostage was returned to their clan:
Our geisha failed to distract the rival army and was executed.
A great prize indeed! Kyoto is under our control; we must hold it for a year in order to claim the Shogunate.
We have secured a source of iron, enabling the production of the strongest ships and armour.
An enemy metsuke had our agent executed, having implicated them in crimes against the people.
This ninja is ready to develop his skills, having perfected his mastery of ninjutsu by carrying out his lord’s wishes.
We have lost our source of superior iron, affecting trade and recruitment costs.
Losing our superior wood resources will affect the quality of our shipbuilding and prevent us from building military ports.
Our metsuke failed to inculpate an enemy agent and has himself been put to the sword.
Tragedy! Our foreign veteran has fallen in single combat against the enemy!
This settlement has been stirred to revolt! An enemy ishin shishi has been spreading lies amongst the people.
A rival daimyo has declared himself Shogun and claimed the power for his clan.
Our reputation preceeds us. Word of our family's exploits spreads far and wide, uttered with awe and respect.
This beautiful flower blossomed and is now ready to marry. Choose her suitor wisely, she can ensure loyalty to the clan or seal good relations with another.
The birth of a child is always a joyous occasion, but when a family is blessed with multiple children it is cause for celebration indeed.
We have secured a source of cotton, enabling the development of our our textiles industry.
The enemy landed an army on our soil.
An enemy missionary was found amongst the army, attempting to demoralise the men. He failed in his despicable task.
Despite enemy attempts to demoralise the army it remains ready to fight to the bitter end.
There is a shortage of food in this province. Turmoil abounds as the populace struggle to sustain themselves.
An enemy fleet bombarded one of our cities!
We have lost our Chinese silk resource, affecting trade in luxury goods.
Once fiercely loyal, these samurai have rebelled against their masters!
This castle reached its population limit. Increase its capacity through further construction.
This metsuke is ready to develop his skills, having honed his abilities through the execution of his lord’s justice.
This metsuke was attempting to bribe one of our clan members. He has paid for this impudence with his life.
The European trade ship is now ours, my lord, a ship that will ensure our mastery of the waves. It was found to be carrying a number of goods and treasures that have now been returned to the capital.
The capricious waves claimed crew members from our fleet.
The daimyo chose to unite our clan with another through marriage, easing the tensions between us.
It is a time of mourning and yet the leadership of the clan is still uncertain. A loyal retainer was named regent until the daimyo's heir comes of age.
Our ships are raiding an enemy trade route, blocking the flow of money to their coffers.
Loyalty is as priceless as any rare jewel. This man hopes to prove his by offering to command clan forces in battle.
Our sou was executed for trying to persuade an enemy agent to enter retire.
An enemy ishin shishi attempted to assassinate one of our subjects. He has been caught and executed.
Having had a crisis of conscience this agent retreated to a place of solitude.
A good son accepts the marriage proposed by his father. By marrying the daimyo's son to the daughter of a rival leader diplomatic relations between our two clans are greatly improved.
Look at them flee, like rats before the hawk. The enemy army is in retreat!
Our monk was caught moving amongst an enemy army and executed.
Whilst attempting to spread the word of God this agent was executed by the enemy.
This monk is ready to develop his skills, having diligently devoted his thoughts for the benefit of the clan.
An enemy shinsengumi attempted to seed dissention amongst our people, but their loyalty never faltered.
After lengthy consideration we have abandoned the Emperor and committed our forces to the Shogun. Undoubtedly there will be repercussions during the months ahead.
Seeing the futility of the Shogun's struggle, the daimyo of this clan has wisely chosen to abandon his former lord and support the Emperor.
We have lost all sources of machinery, preventing us from further developing our metal-processing plants.
This settlement has been stirred to revolt! An enemy missionary has been spreading lies amongst the people.
Having failed to harass enemy forces, our foreign veteran was captured and killed.
Failure! Caught attempting to persuade enemy forces to join us, our ishin shishi was executed.
Our monomi successfully sabotaged his target, using all the subversive skills available to him.
The people are angered at their treatment and have risen up in revolt!
Not all are swayed by a lady's charm. Our geisha falied to enchant an enemy subject.
Mastery of the arts improves our potential for military and civic development.
A building was sabotaged by an enemy monomi. The culprit escaped undetected.
Chaos reigns! Our monk successfully incited revolt in this settlement.
Our fleet was sent to the depths along with everyone aboard. Their spirits are destined to wander the ocean floor forever.
This man lacks even the conviction to persuade a common soldier! Let us hope this isn't a common occurrence.
The enemy fleet withdrew from this battle.
Our men do not fear empty threats; an enemy shinsengumi has failed to coerce their joining of his cause.
This general turned on his former masters and joined our cause.
A powerful clan has been crushed. Now their bodies are food for the carrion!
This man doesn't even have the wits to bribe a soldier! He failed us, let us hope this isn't a common occurrence.
Our ninja failed to sabotage his target building. He was captured and summarily executed.
This sou was executed for attempting to incite unrest within enemy lands.
Our foreign veteran failed to harass enemy forces, barely managing to escape with his life.
Our vassal has lost a province, thereby diminishing both our domains.
One of our subjects met their end under suspicious circumstances. There is no mistaking the hand of the enemy in this event.
Our monomi successfully assassinated his target, using all the strength and cunning available to him.
Our missionary forced an enemy agent to reconsider his beliefs.

Our exploits are talked of the length and breadth of Japan. The name of our daimyo is on everybody’s lips, uttered with awe and fear in equal measures. It will not be long before the Shogun decides to act against us; we must prepare ourselves for this eventuality.
Seeing folly in the Emperor's bid for control, the daimyo of this clan has wisely chosen to abandon his former lord and fight for the rightful Shogunate.
Our shirabyoshi successfully distracted the rival army.
Words are as powerful as weapons. Our sou caused enemy troops to doubt their leadership.
Every man needs an heir to continue his work when his time of dissolution arrives. Male children are a blessing that will secure the family line in the future.
The daimyo of this clan has turned his back on the Shogun and defected to the Imperialists! Such treachery will not stand!
Mastery of the military and civic arts increases our standing amongst the other clans, proving our inherent superiority.
The enemy are blockading our port! This valuable resource must be taken back with haste, lest we lose vital trade income.
Time slipped away from us! Little now remains for the completion of our objectives.
Our lands have been lost! The clan's proud warriors now feed the soil.
We have captured a foreign veteran attempting to harass our forces. He has been put to the sword.
We have lost all sources of tea, preventing expansion of the entertainment industry within our domain.
An enemy monk was captured attempting to demoralise our troops. He was executed as an example to others.
The enemy sent its missionary into our midst to demoralise the men. We have taken his life as an example to others.

We have received disturbing news, my lord. Our sources within this once-friendly clan warn us that their daimyo, intent on exploiting our current situation, is now plotting to invade us. We must prepare for any hostilities!
Our monomi was detected by agents of another clan. He may now be vulnerable to their machinations.
An enemy agent retired to consider the difficult path to enlightenment.
A foreign veteran has attempted to harass our forces! Unable to cause casualties, he managed to evade capture.
Our men detected the presence of a rival monomi. We must be cautious.
All animosity between our clan and our former enemy is forgotten. Peace has been brokered and all forces have returned to their rightful places.
The downfall of this enemy sou was his failure to break the resolve of our subject. He was executed for the crime.
Our ishin shishi failed to assassinate his target. He was murdered whilst attempting to escape.
We have grown powerful indeed, my lord. All now fear our potential; we must expect to face mounting opposition in the coming years.
This man proved himself and received promotion as a result.
The events surrounding this agent's death are decidedly suspicious. There is blood on the hands of our enemies.
An enemy geisha  attempted to seduce one of our subjects. Loyalty has prevailed, but we must be vigilant.
No amount of careful persuasion could convince the people of this settlement to rebel against their masters.
All have perished! Not a single man remains to carry our banner - it lies trampled in the dust.
The loss of our high quality craft goods will affect the clan's wealth in every way.
One of our agents met her end under suspicious circumstances. There is no mistaking the hand of the enemy in this event.
An ishin shishi has been caught trying to foster betrayal amongst our troops. He has been silenced.
A few carefully chosen words can bring an entire settlement to its knees. Our agent successfully incited revolt here.
Some men's hearts are weak. An enemy ninja successfully sabotaged our army.
We captured the castle at the heart of enemy's territory, a crushing blow to their campaign and continued proof of our own limitless power!
Today, a boy becomes a man. Our lord's son has come of age and is ready to fight at his father's side. We have seen the beginnings of a fine general.
Even the mightiest of clans are insignificant when facing our own!
Following a period of religious contemplation, our agent returned refreshed and ready to serve at the capital.
This man reached the end of his days and met his death at peace.
The people are beginning to doubt the clan leadership, an enemy agent having spread dissent amongst them.
The enemy attacked a valuable trade route belonging to our clan. They must be destroyed before trade can continue there.
The enemy sent a sou to foster dissent in our province. With failure his life is forfeit.
An enemy ninja was captured and executed whilst trying to sabotage our army.
Our men know well where their loyalties lie; an enemy ishin shishi has failed to secure their betrayal.
This man lacks the ruthlessness to coerce even the weakest of soldiers! He must not fail us again.
We have acquired impressive steeds, enabling us to radically improve the quality of our cavalry.
The respect our men have for the daimyo prevented the enemy from bribing them into his service.
The enemy has damaged one of our railway stations; transit across the province will not be possible until repairs have been made.
Without access to superior stone resources, we will be unable to construct great castles.

My lord! A great vessel cuts an eastward path towards Japan, a mighty European trade ship wielding more destructive power than anything we can build. We should hunt down and capture this black ship for ourselves. To possess such a ship would render us indomitable at sea!
The weak will always be crushed by the strong. A once-great clan was destroyed utterly.
An enemy missionary converted the weak mind of our agent to his false religion.
Some men's hearts are weak. An enemy shirabyoshi successfully distracted our troops.
This monomi is ready to develop his skills, having perfected his clandestine abilities by carrying out his lord’s wishes.
This mission was cancelled due to unforeseen circumstances.
Damnation! Our army was demoralised by an enemy sou.
This man failed us. He was caught attempting to bribe the enemy and was summarily put to death.
The heart of the clan has been ripped out by the enemy! Our capital is in their hands; the people at their mercy.
This sou is ready to develop his skills, having diligently devoted his thoughts for the benefit of the family.
An enemy shinsengumi spread dissent throughout this province! The people have risen against us!
The fate of Kyoto hangs in the balance! Two clans fight for control of the capital.
An enemy sou attempted to demoralise our troops. He was executed as an example to others.
Our junsatsushi was executed attempting to pay an enemy agent to abandon their master.
These insignificant insects were wiped from the face of the earth!
An enemy ninja was spotted moving amongst the men! Early detection prevented the poison of dissent coursing through the army.
A rival shirabyoshi was captured and executed whilst attempting to distract our troops.
We have secured modern machinery, enabling the development of advanced metal-processing plants.
Our army was demoralised by an enemy agent.

Fear and wonder are a powerful combination that our clan has used to its advantage. All Japan stands in awe of our mighty Shogun, but we must tread cautiously; our enemies and those loyal to the former Shogun are sure to take arms against us.
Raiding an enemy's trade routes prevents them making money from their resources.
This junsatushi was caught attempting to bribe our men. He will never bribe another man again.

Having been liberated by a successful Ikko Ikki revolt, this province is now under our control. Some of the population surely remain loyal to their former masters; we must be mindful of local public order.
The daimyo of this clan has abandoned the Emperor and thrown his lot in with the Shogunate! Such treachery will not stand!
The respect our men have for their lord prevented the enemy from bribing them.
This enemy missionary attempted to persuade our agents to desert their beliefs. He has faced death for his crime.
The downfall of this enemy agent was his failure to defeat the resolve of our own. He was executed for the crime.
Tragedy! Our shirabyoshi was murdered for attempting the seduction of an enemy.
An enemy sou spread dissent throughout this province! The people have risen against us!
Our ninja was detected by those in service of another clan. He may now be vulnerable to the machinations of enemy agents.
These two great clans put their differences aside, declaring a new era of peace throughout the land.
After lengthy consideration we have abandoned the Shogunate and committed our forces to the Emperor. Undoubtedly there will be repercussions for months to come.
Renouncing Christianity in favour of enlightened Buddhism can only appease those who follow the old ways, but may anger the converted.
Although unable to kill his target, our ishin shishi still managed to wound and temporarily put them out of action.
A day for celebration! The daimyo's son married the daughter of a loyal retainer, only strengthening the bonds of loyalty within the clan.
The enemy sent a religious man to spread poison through the army. Having failed, his life is now forfeit.
An enemy missionary was executed as punishment for trying to incite insurrection. His kind will not be tolerated.
A powerful clan has been destroyed by a rival. Now the bodies of their warriors are food for carrion!
Our shirabyoshi failed to distract the rival army.
Our monomi failed to eliminate his target and was detected, managing to escape the clutches of the enemy and a certain death.
This general is ready to develop his skills, having honed his ability to command.
Dishonour on his family! This man's defection is a great insult to the clan, his family have been expelled forthwith.
An enemy monomi was detected whilst attempting the assassination of a man loyal to our family.
Our ninja failed to eliminate his target. He was caught and executed whilst trying to escape.
Today, a boy becomes a man. Our lord's kin has come of age and is ready to fight at his brother's side. We have seen the beginnings of a fine general.
This agent died following the destruction of the navy to which they were assigned.
Our foreign veteran successfully harassed an enemy army, bringing death and disarray to them.
Our vassal has successfully secured a province, thereby strengthening both our domains.
The people have taken up arms against their rightful masters!
Treachery! Our men have joined the enemy.
This man died at the hands of an enemy agent! We must apprehend the culprit behind this heinous crime!
Weakness! Our troops were coerced by an enemy shinsengumi, abandoning our cause for treachery.
Even the most virtuous have their price! Our silver-tongued junsatsushi bribed rival forces to join us.
Even the most loyal of spirits can be swayed! Our ishin shishi successfully persuaded rival forces to join our cause.
The enemy released our agent from imprisonment. They returned to the capital and are ready to serve the clan once more.
An enemy monomi was detected attempting to sabotage our building.
Our honoured foe fell in battle, now sitting with pride amongst the ancestors.
The enemy army is wracked with doubt thanks to the efforts of our agent.
The daimyo is dead! His honoured wife will take control of the clan's interests until their son comes of age.
Our geisha successfully seduced an enemy. He has abandoned his former master and sworn himself to our cause.
Our monomi has been detected whilst attempting to sabotage an enemy building.
This enemy agent retired to reconsider his path to enlightenment.
An enemy fleet bombarded one of our armies!
This agent died following the destruction of the army to which they were assigned.
Our missionary was captured and executed whilst attempting to convert an enemy agent.
Our monk was executed for trying to persuade an enemy agent to give up his vocation.
A woman's wiles are no match for one's loyalty to their lord. This enemy shirabyoshi was executed for attempting the seduction of our subject.
Deplorable! One of our subjects was enchanted by an enemy geisha. Now he serves her lord.
A few carefully chosen words can bring an entire settlement to its knees. Our shinsengumi successfully incited revolt here.
Skilled craftsmen create beautiful goods, increasing both the inner and outer wealth of the clan.
The enemy attempted to assassinate a member of our clan! Having succeeded only in wounding them, the assassin has now escaped.
Words can be as powerful as the sword. Our monk caused the enemy troops to doubt their leadership.
Our ninja has been detected whilst attempting to sabotage an enemy building.
Our forces have been harassed by a foreign veteran! Many have died and the men are in dissaray!
This geisha is ready to perfect her skills, having developed her performing art.
An enemy junsatsushi attempted to pay-off one of our agents, but was caught and executed.
Rest and reflection mean this agent is now restored to full health and awaiting fresh orders at the clan capital.
We have secured a source of tea, essential for entertainment establishments.
This man lacks even the wits to bribe a common soldier! Let us hope this isn't a common occurrence.
Chaos reigns! Our sou successfully incited a revolt in this province.
These two clans elected to form an alliance. This agreement will strengthen them both.

Another clan has established Japan's first railway connection! This advanced method of transport allows armies and agents to move quickly between interconnected provinces; we would surely benefit from developing our own rail network.
Having resolved to return power to the Emperor, this ishin shishi is ready to develop his skills in anger.
Our sou was caught attempting to demoralise an enemy force. He has been executed.
One of our subjects has been wounded in an assassination attempt by an enemy ishin shishi.
We have acquired a good source of stone, enabling the construction of superior castles and reducing local construction costs.
A rival shirabyoshi was seen attempting to distract our troops. Utterly devoted to their duty, they were not swayed by her performance.
An agent has been recruited to aid our cause.\\n\\n
The influence of this clan is far-reaching. Their growing power concerns the Shogun.
This man failed us. Caught attempting to bribe the enemy, he was summarily put to death.

We have established Japan's first railway connection! This advanced method of transport will allow us to move armies and agents quickly between interconnected railway stations, as long as they belong to us or to a clan with whom we have agreed military access.
Due to the state of our diplomatic relations with the ruling clan, our army was compelled to withdraw from their territory.
The turbulence of the times calls for radical new concepts. As such, we embrace Christianity. This will affect how some clans view our own and has placed our daimyo's honour in doubt.
Our shirabyoshi failed to distract the rival army and was executed.
Even the most fearless of spirits can be broken! Our shinsengumi cold-heartedly coerced rival forces to join us.
We successfully forged an alliance with another clan, strengthening us both.
Treachery! Swayed by ishin shishi lies, our troops have abandoned our cause and joined the enemy.
The construction of a legendary building is a matter of great pride. It is admired by all who see it.
An enemy fleet bombarded one of our provinces!
Our ever-growing renown makes the Shogun nervous; there are whispers upon the wind that he plots against our clan to halt our rise to power!

Power breeds fear among the weak. Fearful of our strength and influence, the imperial family has declared us enemies of the state. We must be prepared; no one can be relied upon to aid us, not even our sister family.
This army was demoralised by the words of an enemy missionary.
This monk was executed for inciting unrest amongst the people.
Our missionary was executed in the course of his duty, having failed to incite rebellion amongst the people.
We have lost the source of our superior horses to the enemy, greatly reducing the effectiveness of our cavalry.
Having had a crisis of conscience, this agent retreated to a place of solitude.
One of our former trade partners has broken their agreement with us at the request of a third party. They will pay for meddling in our affairs!
We have lost all sources of cotton, preventing further development of our textiles industry.
Not all are ready to accept the word of God. Our missionary failed to  convert an enemy agent.
Some are too narrow minded to reach for enlightenment. We failed to broaden this enemy agent's mind.
An enemy foreign veteran was captured and executed for attempting the sabotage of a building.
The loyalty of some knows no bounds. Our junsatsushi failed to convince the people of this province to join us. His reward was death at their hands.

This clan’s ruling family has been eradicated. A distant relative has stepped forth to assume the mantle of daimyo and - for the time being - their clan’s future is secured. However, the turmoil following the loss of their daimyo and his kin will has left the clan vulnerable. We may wish to capitalise on this turn of events.
Our shinobi succeeded in sabotaging the enemy army and escaped undetected.
Our hidden army was spotted by forces belonging to another clan.
An enemy ishin shishi has assassinated one of our subjects. This will not stand!
Beautiful Kyoto is lost to us, and with it the seat of all power in Japan. We must recapture it!

A foreign veteran challenged one of our own to single combat. Honourless in the face of defeat, he fled from the duel.

When an ally is attacked it is dishonourable merely to stand back and watch the fighting unfold. We should support him in this latest endeavour.
Having developed a talent for subterfuge, this shinobi is ready to master his skills.
Our foreign veteran was defeated by his opponent in single combat, barely managing to escape with his life.
Dishonour! Our geisha failed in her mission and was executed by the enemy.
The daimyo of another clan died. An honourable man, he is mourned by friend and foe alike.
Following the death of our lord his honoured wife was named regent until their son is returned from captivity.
An enemy shinobi was apprehended and executed following an assassination attempt.
The puppets have been returned to power! The Ashikaga Shogunate rules once again.
Our sou failed to spread despair amongst the enemy.
In these times of turmoil people seek solace in religion. In its search for answers a rival clan chose to adopt Christianity.
Having attempted to distract a garrison from their duty, a rival geisha was caught and executed.
Our ninja succeeded in sabotaging his target army and escaped undetected.
The ebb and flow of war has caused both us to gain and lose important natural resources. Essential to the economy and the business of war, we must strive to keep them secure at all times.
The people have risen up in revolt against us.
Owing to our modernisation efforts, we are now able to further develop our clan's military technologies and civil policies.
Crippling a man's heart is far more effective than crippling his army. A young hostage was taken to assure the outcome of our diplomatic negotiations.
Having resolved to support the Shogun until death, this shinsengumi is ready to develop his skills in anger.
An enemy shinobi was detected attempting to sabotage our building.
The people of this province do not share our religion; without action there could be insurrection!
An enemy monomi was spotted moving amongst the men! Early detection prevented any misfortune from befalling the army.

This shirabyoshi is ready to develop her skills, having worked her magic on friend and foe alike.
One of our rivals began construction of a legendary building.
This means war! Talk will not resolve our differences; the only remaining option is to put them all to the sword.

Tragedy! Our honoured daimyo and his heirs have been destroyed by our enemies! In the absence of male descendants our lord has been succeeded by a distant relative. The future of the clan has been secured - for the time being - but the repercussions of our loss will affect the people for years to come.
Even the mightiest of clans are of little consequence when faced with the power of our own!
An enemy ishin shishi was executed as punishment for trying to incite insurrection. Dissidents will not be tolerated.
The daimyo is dead! Following the death of this honoured man his son has entered court life at the clan capital. Long may he reign!
It seems that money cannot buy everything. An enemy agent resisted our attempt to pay him off.

The civil war rages on, and our achievements in the Emperor's name have been without equal. In honour of your loyalty and dilligence, he has declared you regent!\\n\\nYou may now appoint a general to the office of commander-in-chief.
This province is now under our control. Widening our grip helps to increase overall wealth through taxation and trade.
A building was sabotaged by an enemy ninja. The culprit escaped undetected.
We have reclaimed what is rightfully ours. The people are celebrating in the streets at the daimyo's return.
Men have arrived from overseas to trade with us. We can defeat our enemies utterly with the deadly new weapons they have brought to our shores.
Our ninja failed to sabotage the enemy army and was detected, somehow managing to escape with his life.
Our relationship with this clan broke down to the extent that trade between us is cancelled forthwith.
The enemy's attempts to incite a revolt here have failed.
An enemy agent attempted to seed dissention amongst the people, but their loyalty to the clan never faltered.
A faithful general was rewarded with marriage to the daimyo's daughter. This will only increase his loyalty to the clan.
Enemy ships raided a valuable trade route belonging to our clan. They must be destroyed before trade can continue there.
We have lost all sources of copper, preventing our development of strong ships and military ports.
Death before dishonour! This man was executed as an example to others who would betray the clan.

Our castle is under siege! The defenders will hold out for as long as possible, but it will not be long before supplies run out and they are compelled to surrender. It is vital that they sally out to meet their attackers before this happens.
This man abandoned the clan! The maintenance of loyalty is vital and should be considered at all times.
Glorious! We have triumphed over adversity and succeeded in uniting the people of Japan; a new era of progress and prosperity awaits!
The enemy attempted to assassinate a member of our clan! Having succeeded only in wounding them, the assassin has now escaped.
Through diligence and skill, our shinsengumi successfully assassinated his target.
We have acquired an important resource, allowing us advantageous new construction and recruitment opportunities.

One of our fleets has been damaged by enemy coastal defences.
We are blocked from moving this way due to the presence of another. We must find an alternative route or attack them.
No amount of careful persuasion could convince the people of this settlement to rebel against their masters.
A warlord is nothing without his warriors. Our new unit is ready to serve the clan.
One of our subjects has been wounded in an assassination attempt by an enemy shinsengumi.
An enemy junsatsushi attempted to secure allegiance in one of our provinces. Some of our garrisoned forces betrayed us and joined his cause.
Treachery! One of our provinces has abandoned our cause to throw their lot in with the enemy!
One of our subjects met their end under suspicious circumstances. There is no mistaking the hand of the enemy in this event.
An enemy shinsengumi has assassinated one of our subjects. This will not stand!
In return for service to the Emperor, you have been granted the rank of junior councillor to the Court.\\n\\nYou may now appoint a general to the office of inspector general.

Tragedy! Our honoured daimyo and his heirs have been destroyed by our enemies! With his dying breath, the daimyo entrusted the fate of the clan to his most trusted warrior and bestowed upon him the honour of bearing the clan’s name. The future of the clan has been secured - for the time being  - but the repercussions of our loss will affect the people for years to come.
This source of excellent cotton allows us to provide warm, light and sturdy clothing for our people.

An enemy shinobi was captured and executed whilst trying to sabotage one of our buildings.
Not all are swayed by a lady's charm. Our shirabyoshi falied to seduce an enemy.

Our clan grows strong, ever loyal to the Emperor's cause. In recognition of your long service, you have been promoted to chancellor of state!\\n\\nYou may now appoint a general to the office of chief of staff.
This man committed suicide at his lord's command, so preserving his family's honour.

Word of our achievements have reached the imperial court; His Imperial Majesty now watches our exploits with interest. As we continue to conquer and secure great victories, so our clan’s fame will continue to increase. We must tread cautiously; the Shogun will not take kindly to any who might threaten his authority.
Although unable to kill his target, our shinobi wounded his adversary, temporarily putting him out of action.
We have lost all sources of iron, putting an end to our planned advancement of dock facilities and ships.
